summary: Shells out to the official Kaggle Python CLI (kaggle-node is dead). Reads creds from ~/.kaggle/kaggle.json. Read listings + dataset download + class-2 submit-competition. Propose mode previews submissions; apply mode writes to the leaderboard.

commands.summary: List recent kernels visible to the authenticated user. --mine defaults true.
Download a dataset slug to a local path. Writes a zip locally.
Return the authenticated username + config path (validates creds).

Submit a file to a Kaggle competition via `kaggle competitions submit`. Propose mode previews the argv; apply mode writes to the leaderboard. Class-2 — must be gated by work-graph approvalClass ≥ 2 or rejected by Ghost Shift.
